name: profiles
description: Own-profile record + public profile page. v1: ensure-on-first-login, settings form, current-profile query (username unik global lowercase kebab-case; isPlatformAdmin read-only). v1.1: anonymous /u/[username] page + badge wall via two public* etalase queries with safe projections (AGENTS.md §6).
notes: 0.2.0 (2026-07-06, agent delta): adds the public /u/[username] page + badge wall (STATUS #9). Two anonymous public* etalase queries (publicGetByUsername, publicListBadges) return safe projections only per AGENTS.md §6; badges read the shared courseCompletions/courses/tenants tables (published courses of active tenants only — sanctioned table access, not code import). Avatar renders a CSS-escaped background-image div (mirrors courses/course-card; no next/image remotePatterns coupling). Alpha mounts /u/[username] (see README integration point). 0.1.0: v1 minimal scope per docs/AGENT-PROMPTS.md #4; slice-local Textarea pending integrator `npx shadcn add textarea` (TODO(rr) in components/textarea.tsx).
